The remaining choices are about how we surface schema drift and how “lossless” should be represented so later phases never need to re-open raw logs just to recover important structure.
"Nothing low-confidence goes straight to “person”." Nothing low confidence should go to anywhere, so don't create rules of high-low confidence just for people, but to every entity type.
